text:
AIVA Freelancia — Full Codebase Audit Report
Date:
2026-06-30
Scope:
React/Node.js web platform + multi-model AI assistant (DeepSeek, Llama, Mistral)
Severity Table (Critical → Low)
| Severity | File:Line | Issue | Root Cause | Suggested Fix |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|
CRITICAL
|
.env.local
| Credentials committed to repo | Plaintext API keys, OAuth IDs, email passwords, Spotify tokens, and user passwords all in source | Revoke all keys immediately. Run
git-filter-repo
to purge from history. Never commit
.env.local
. |
|
CRITICAL
|
public/js/chat.js:579
| Code syntax highlighting broken |
lang
captured from regex but never passed to
<code>
— no
class="language-${lang}"
, so hljs can't highlight | Change to
<code class="language-${lang || 'plaintext'}">
and pass
{ language: lang }
to
hljs.hig

class="language-${lang}"
, so hljs can't highlight | Change to
<code class="language-${lang || 'plaintext'}">
and pass
{ language: lang }
to
hljs.highlightElement()
|
|
CRITICAL
|
server.js:804
| Multimodal fallback uses non-vision model |
llama-vision
falls back to
llama-3.3-70b-versatile
which has no vision capability on Groq — fails silently | Replace fallback with an actual vision-capable model or return a clear error to the client |
|
CRITICAL
|
public/index.html:3193
| Hero section ignores theme switch | Dark bg hardcoded in
#top { background-image: url('/hero-bg-dark.png'); }
— light theme override targets body, not
#top
| Move to
[data-theme="dark"] #top
/
[data-theme="light"] #top
selectors, or use a
--hero-bg
CSS variable |
|
HIGH
|
public/css/chat.css:1754
| Mobile message bubb

ta-theme="dark"] #top
/
[data-theme="light"] #top
selectors, or use a
--hero-bg
CSS variable |
|
HIGH
|
public/css/chat.css:1754
| Mobile message bubbles overflow |
.msg { max-width: 80%; }
+ 32px avatar + 14px gap on a 360px viewport leaves no space for text | Add breakpoints: 85% at 640px, 90% at 480px; add
overflow-wrap: break-word
to
.msg-bubble
|
|
HIGH
|
public/js/chat.js:1751–1754
| Chat messages invisible on mobile | Flex container doesn't account for avatar + gap on small screens — content pushed off-screen | Use
flex-wrap: wrap
on tablets or
flex-direction: column
below 640px |
|
HIGH
|
public/css/mobile.css:519–527
| Light-mode modals go dark on touch devices |
backdrop-filter
disabled for GPU savings, replaced with hardcoded
rgba(10,10,10,0.92)
— dark even in light theme | Use

als go dark on touch devices |
backdrop-filter
disabled for GPU savings, replaced with hardcoded
rgba(10,10,10,0.92)
— dark even in light theme | Use
var(--bg-glass-strong)
instead of hardcoded rgba; define per-theme values |
|
HIGH
|
server.js:487
| TTS reads "." as "Full Stop" |
SpeechSynthesisUtterance
reads punctuation literally; no preprocessing strips or replaces periods before speech | Strip or replace periods before TTS:
text.replace(/\./g, '')
, or use SSML pause tags |
|
HIGH
|
public/js/chat.js:3588–3592
| TTS sentence splitter breaks on abbreviations | Regex splits
"Dr. Smith"
into
"Dr"
+
" Smith went..."
| Replace with abbreviation-aware regex or a proper sentence tokenizer library |
|
HIGH
|
public/index.html:43–45
| Favicon missing required sizes | Only 32×32 and 64×64 PNGs

on-aware regex or a proper sentence tokenizer library |
|
HIGH
|
public/index.html:43–45
| Favicon missing required sizes | Only 32×32 and 64×64 PNGs provided — no 16px, 96px, 192px, 512px, no SVG, no WebP | Generate all sizes, add
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml">
, update
manifest.json
|
|
HIGH
|
public/
(images) | Hero/logo images 908 KB each, unoptimized |
hero-bg-dark.png
,
full-aiva-logo.png
,
aiva-dp.png
load synchronously with no WebP/AVIF fallback | Convert to WebP (≈60% smaller), use
<picture>
tags, add
loading="lazy"
on non-critical images |
|
MEDIUM
|
server.js:526–530
| Provider selection logic inverted |
resolveProvider()
always prefers Groq when both keys exist — no way to prefer NVIDIA | Add
PRIMARY_AI_PROVIDER
env var to control preference |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/js/chat.

lways prefers Groq when both keys exist — no way to prefer NVIDIA | Add
PRIMARY_AI_PROVIDER
env var to control preference |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/js/chat.js:1515–1522
| Stream response clears previous tokens |
activeMsgBubble.innerHTML = ""
on loader removal wipes already-streamed content | Remove loader with
.remove()
only; never clear the whole
innerHTML
|
|
MEDIUM
|
public/css/chat.css:3397–3427
| Chat feed padding not reduced on mobile |
.chat-messages { padding: 24px; }
unchanged at 480px — eats 48px on a 320px screen | Add
padding: 14px 12px
at the 480px breakpoint |
|
MEDIUM
|
server.js:1066–1114
| No retry on audio transcription failure | Transient Groq network errors permanently fail voice dictation | Wrap with exponential-backoff retry (e.g.
p-retry
, max 2 retries) |
|
MEDIUM
|
publ

Transient Groq network errors permanently fail voice dictation | Wrap with exponential-backoff retry (e.g.
p-retry
, max 2 retries) |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/index.html:46–47
|
<link rel="preload">
media attribute unreliable | Browsers may ignore
media
on preload and load all images regardless | Remove media-gated preload; let CSS media queries control loading |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/js/chat.js:3664–3670
|
lang
value not sanitized in HTML class |
"c++"
,
"c#"
in class name → malformed HTML | Sanitize:
lang.replace(/[^a-z0-9_-]/gi, '')
before inserting into class |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/js/chat.js:68–77
| No client-side model validation |
modelSelector.value
can be arbitrary DOM-manipulated string | Whitelist check against
["mistral","llama8b","llama","llama-vision","deepseek","compound"]
before send |

ue
can be arbitrary DOM-manipulated string | Whitelist check against
["mistral","llama8b","llama","llama-vision","deepseek","compound"]
before send |
|
MEDIUM
|
public/css/chat.css
| No
:focus-visible
on interactive elements |
.chat-send
,
.btn-copy-msg
,
.chat-tool
have no keyboard-focus outline | Add
outline: 2px solid var(--cyan); outline-offset: 2px
on
:focus-visible
|
|
LOW
|
server.js:847
| Raw
err.message
sent to client | Internal paths or stack trace fragments may leak in error responses | Log internally; send only generic
"Service unavailable"
to client |
|
LOW
|
public/js/chat.js:1308–1341
| Dead
spinnerHtml
assignments | Multiple alternatives assigned but only the last survives | Delete unused assignments |
|
LOW
|
public/js/chat.js
(whole file) | 5,470-line monolith, no JSDoc |

lternatives assigned but only the last survives | Delete unused assignments |
|
LOW
|
public/js/chat.js
(whole file) | 5,470-line monolith, no JSDoc | Hard to maintain; no types, no param docs | Split into modules; add JSDoc blocks on exported functions |
Top 5 to Fix First
Revoke & purge
.env.local
— Active credentials in git history is a live security incident. Rotate every key today, then run:
bash
   git-filter-repo --path .env.local --invert-paths
Hero section theme bug (
index.html:3193
)
— Every user who switches theme sees a broken dark background in light mode. Fix:
   ```css
   /
Replace:
/
   #top { background-image: url('/hero-bg-dark.png'); }
/
With:
/
   [data-theme="dark"] #top { background-image: url('/hero-bg-dark.png'); }
   [data-theme="light"] #top { background-image: u

| 'plaintext'}">${escaped}` TTS "Full Stop" bug ( chat.js:487 + 3588–3592 ) — Strip punctuation before TTS; fix the sentence splitter: ```js // Before passing to SpeechSynthesisUtterance: text = text.replace(/./g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); // Replace greedy regex with abbreviation-aware version: // Old: /[^!?]*[^!?.][!?]+|[^.]+(?:.\s+|.$)|[^.]+$/g // New: /(?

754
) |
| 2 | Mobile performance/lag |
Confirmed present
— 908 KB PNGs load synchronously;
chat.js
is 251 KB unminified; backdrop-filter replaced with hardcoded dark color (
mobile.css:519
) |
| 3 | Dark/Light hero inconsistency |
Confirmed present
— Hero bg CSS targets
#top
(always dark) instead of
[data-theme="dark"] #top
(
index.html:3193
) |
| 4 | AI question-answering failures |
Confirmed present
— Vision fallback hits non-vision model silently;
compound-beta
stream returns empty on web-search timeout with no retry (
server.js:804, 471
) |
| 5 | Favicon not rendering at all sizes |
Confirmed present
— Only 32×32 and 64×64 PNGs exist; missing 16px, 96px, 192px, 512px, SVG (
index.html:43–45
) |
| 6 | TTS "Full Stop" mispronunciation |
Confirmed present
— No period pre-processing before

sing 16px, 96px, 192px, 512px, SVG (
index.html:43–45
) |
| 6 | TTS "Full Stop" mispronunciation |
Confirmed present
— No period pre-processing before
SpeechSynthesisUtterance
; abbreviation-unaware sentence splitter (
chat.js:3588–3592
) |
| 7 | DeepSeek/Llama multimodal image failures |
Confirmed present (partial)
— Falls back to non-vision model; Visual Cortex converts image to text so it doesn't crash outright, but vision accuracy is lost (
server.js:534–573, 804
) |
| 8 | Chat interface gaps |
Confirmed present
— Bubble overflow on mobile, code highlight broken, copy button missing success toast, timestamps may not show on touch (
chat.js:1751
,
chat.css:1742
) |
| 9 | "High intelligence" over-generates code |
Confirmed present
— System prompt warns against unsolicited code but model

s:1751
,
chat.css:1742
) |
| 9 | "High intelligence" over-generates code |
Confirmed present
— System prompt warns against unsolicited code but model doesn't always respect it;
isCodeRequest70b
detection regex too greedy (
server.js:741–764
) |
Additional Findings
Security
.env.local
committed with all credentials
(CRITICAL — rotate all keys now)
No CORS headers defined (relying on same-origin policy only)
Raw
err.message
values returned to clients in some routes
Email templates use HTML escaping but check all
innerHTML
usages for XSS exposure
Performance
hero-bg-dark.png
,
aiva-dp.png
,
full-aiva-logo.png
— each ~908 KB, no WebP/AVIF
chat.js
is 5,470 lines / ~251 KB unminified — should be split into ES modules
CSS preload
media
attribute unreliable across browsers
No service worker or cac

is 5,470 lines / ~251 KB unminified — should be split into ES modules
CSS preload
media
attribute unreliable across browsers
No service worker or caching strategy
Accessibility
No
:focus-visible
outlines on buttons — keyboard navigation broken
Some images missing meaningful
alt
text (decorative SVGs correctly use
aria-hidden
)
Color contrast in light theme not verified against WCAG AA
Missing Organization/Founder JSON-LD schema markup for SEO
Code Quality
No TypeScript — runtime type errors possible
Inconsistent error response shapes (
{ reply: "" }
vs
{ error: "" }
)
Magic numbers throughout (timeouts, token counts, delays)
Stale/unused
spinnerHtml
variable assignments in
chat.js:1308–1341
Minimal Spotify integration error handling
Audit performed 2026-06-30. Covers 40+ source files: ser

nnerHtml
variable assignments in
chat.js:1308–1341
Minimal Spotify integration error handling
Audit performed 2026-06-30. Covers 40+ source files: server.js, chat.js, login.js, consensus.js, chat.css, mobile.css, style.css, index.html, and all supporting assets.
